public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as boundary witness.
appearance: Aster Frostglass usually presents in frost-touched garments dusted with harmless arcane residue, with details that make their boundary witness status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a boundary witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of boundary witness in and around Crystalline Vault, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Crystalline Vault workable through the obligations of boundary witness while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must make memory legible under conditions that reward forgetting, misfiling, or selective recall. Around Crystalline Vault, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of boundary witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Aster Frostglass can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Aster Frostglass needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Crystalline Vault.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Boundary Witness, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Sheresh Communes.
what_they_refuse: Aster Frostglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Boundary Witness too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Aster Frostglass can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Aster Frostglass adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
